name: ATrack Technology Inc.
summary: ATrack Technology Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells GPS telematics hardware in Taiwan and internationally. It offers hardwired fleet tracking devices, plug and play GPS tracking units, and IP rated tracking devices, as well as accessories. The company's products are used in cars, trucks, containers and non-powered assets, trailers, and motorcycles. ATrack Technology Inc. was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
